Machete (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $26,593,646Details
International Box Office $19,777,324
Worldwide Box Office $46,370,970
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $15,474,641
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,223,529
Total $20,698,170
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After a violent shakedown from a notorious drug lord nearly kills him, Machete, a renegade Mexican Federale and tough-as-nails vigilante for justice, roams the streets of Texas, working as a day laborer. When Machete is hired by a crooked US Senator to execute a covert hit, Machete is double-crossed and forced to run from the cops and an endless stream of assassins. But what they don't know is that Machete is looking for them so he can settle the score.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,416,164 (42.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.33 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,500,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,670 opening theaters/2,678 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $40,311,790

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 3rd, 2010 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
Video Release: January 4th, 2011 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence throughout, language, some sexual content and nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2132, 8/4/2010)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Franchise: Machete
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Grindhouse, Prologue
Plot point: Hitmen, Immigration, Killer Nuns, Political, Revenge, Twins
Social setting: Mexploitation, Organized Crime
Source material: Based on a Fake Trailer
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Troublemaker Studios, Overnight Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: Spanish, English

Synopsis

After a violent shakedown from a notorious drug lord nearly kills him, Machete, a renegade Mexican Federale and tough-as-nails vigilante for justice, roams the streets of Texas, working as a day laborer. When Machete is hired by a crooked US Senator to execute a covert hit, Machete is double-crossed and forced to run from the cops and an endless stream of assassins. But what they don't know is that Machete is looking for them so he can settle the score.
